title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
summary: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."
title_ja: Meta、InstagramのAI機能撤回
summary_ja: Metaは「クリエイティブツールを提供する意図だったが、フィードバックを受け機能を取り下げた」とブログで説明した。
_translate_source:
Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
"Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."
